greate.ponder.belt_casing.text_1: Brass or Metal Casing can be used to decorate Mechanical Belts
greate.ponder.belt_casing.text_2: A wrench can be used to remove the casing
greate.ponder.belt_connector.text_1: Right-Clicking two shafts with a belt item will connect them together
greate.ponder.belt_connector.text_2: Accidental selections can be canceled with Right-Click while Sneaking
greate.ponder.belt_connector.text_3: Additional Shafts can be added throughout the Belt
greate.ponder.belt_connector.text_4: Shafts connected via Belts will rotate with Identical Speed and Direction
greate.ponder.belt_connector.text_5: Added shafts can be removed using the wrench
greate.ponder.belt_connector.text_6: Mechanical Belts can be dyed for aesthetic purposes
greate.ponder.belt_directions.text_1: Belts cannot connect in arbitrary directions
greate.ponder.belt_directions.text_5: 4. And they can connect vertical shafts horizontally
greate.ponder.belt_directions.text_6: These are all possible directions. Belts can span any Length between 2 and 20 blocks
greate.ponder.belt_transport.text_1: Moving belts will transport Items and other Entities
greate.ponder.belt_transport.text_2: Right-Click with an empty hand to take items off a belt
greate.ponder.cogwheel.text_1: Cogwheels will relay rotation to other adjacent cogwheels
greate.ponder.cogwheel.text_2: Neighbouring shafts connected like this will rotate in opposite directions
greate.ponder.cogwheel_casing.text_1: Brass or Metal Casing can be used to decorate Cogwheels
greate.ponder.cogwheel_casing.text_2: Components added after encasing will not connect to the shaft outputs
greate.ponder.cogwheel_casing.text_3: The Wrench can be used to toggle connections
greate.ponder.cog_speedup.text_1: Large and Small cogs can be connected diagonally
greate.ponder.cog_speedup.text_2: Shifting from large to small cogs, the conveyed speed will be doubled
greate.ponder.cog_speedup.text_3: Shifting the opposite way, the conveyed speed will be halved
greate.ponder.crushing_wheels.text_1: A pair of Crushing Wheels can grind items very effectively
greate.ponder.crushing_wheels.text_2: Their Rotational Input has to make them spin into each other
greate.ponder.crushing_wheels.text_3: Items thrown or inserted into the top will get processed
greate.ponder.crushing_wheels.text_4: Items can be inserted and picked up through automated means as well
greate.ponder.fan_direction.text_1: Encased Fans use Rotational Force to create an Air Current
greate.ponder.fan_direction.text_2: Strength and Direction of Flow depends on the Rotational Input
greate.ponder.fan_processing.text_1: When passing through lava, the Air Flow becomes Heated
greate.ponder.fan_processing.text_2: Items caught in the area will be smelted
greate.ponder.fan_processing.text_3: Food items thrown here would be incinerated
greate.ponder.fan_processing.text_4: Instead, a setup for Smoking using Fire should be used for them
greate.ponder.fan_processing.text_5: Air Flows passing through water create a Washing Setup
greate.ponder.fan_processing.text_6: Some interesting new processing can be done with it
greate.ponder.fan_processing.text_7: The Speed of the Fan DOES affect the processing speed, in addition to its range
greate.ponder.fan_processing.text_8: Fan Processing can also be applied to Items on Depots and Belts
greate.ponder.gearbox.text_1: Jumping between axes of rotation can get bulky quickly
greate.ponder.gearbox.text_2: A gearbox is the more compact equivalent of this setup
greate.ponder.gearbox.text_3: Shafts around corners rotate in mirrored directions
greate.ponder.large_cogwheel.header: Relaying rotational force using Large Cogwheels
greate.ponder.large_cogwheel.text_1: Large cogwheels can connect to each other at right angles
greate.ponder.large_cogwheel.text_2: It will help relaying conveyed speed to other axes of rotation
greate.ponder.mechanical_mixer.header: Processing Items with the Mechanical Mixer
greate.ponder.mechanical_mixer.text_1: With a Mixer and Basin, some Crafting Recipes can be automated
greate.ponder.mechanical_mixer.text_2: Available recipes include any Shapeless Crafting Recipe, plus a couple extra ones
greate.ponder.mechanical_mixer.text_3: Some of those recipes may require the heat of a Blaze Burner
greate.ponder.mechanical_mixer.text_4: The filter slot can be used in case two recipes are conflicting.
greate.ponder.mechanical_press_compactin: Compacting items with the Mechanical Press
Pressing items held in a Basin will cause them to be Compacted
Compacting includes any filled 2x2 or 3x3 Crafting Recipe, plus a couple extra ones
Some of those recipes may require the heat of a Blaze Burner
The filter slot can be used in case two recipes are conflicting.
greate.ponder.mechanical_pump_flow.text_: Mechanical Pumps govern the flow of their attached pipe networks
Their arrow indicates the direction of flow
The network behind is now pulling fluids...
...while the network in front is transferring it outward
The pumps direction is unaffected by the input rotation
Instead, a Wrench can be used to reverse the direction
greate.ponder.mechanical_pump_speed.head: Throughput of Mechanical Pumps
greate.ponder.mechanical_pump_speed.text: Regardless of speed, Mechanical Pumps affect pipes connected up to 16 blocks away
Speeding up the input rotation changes the speed of flow propagation...
...and the speed at which fluids are transferred
Pumps can combine their throughputs within shared pipe networks
Ensure that all of them are facing in the same direction
greate.ponder.mechanical_saw_breaker.hea: Cutting Trees with the Mechanical Saw
greate.ponder.mechanical_saw_breaker.tex: When given Rotational Force, a Mechanical Saw will cut trees directly in front of it
In order to cut the tree fully, the Saw has to break the last block connecting it to the ground
greate.ponder.mechanical_saw_contraption: Whenever Saws are moved as part of an animated Contraption...
...they will cut any trees the contraption runs them into
Processing Items on the Mechanical Saw
Upward facing Mechanical Saws can process a variety of items
The processed item always moves against the rotational input to the saw
Saws can work in-line with Mechanical Belts
When an ingredient has multiple possible outcomes, the filter slot can specify it
Without filter, the Saw would cycle through all outcomes instead
greate.ponder.millstone.text_1: Millstones process items by grinding them
greate.ponder.millstone.text_2: They can be powered from the side using cogwheels
greate.ponder.millstone.text_3: Throw or Insert items at the top
greate.ponder.millstone.text_4: After some time, the result can be obtained via Right-click
greate.ponder.millstone.text_5: The outputs can also be extracted by automation
greate.ponder.shaft.text_1: Shafts will relay rotation in a straight line.
greate.ponder.shaft_casing.text_1: Brass or Andesite Casing can be used to decorate Shafts
